summary: Iteration 13 - Component splitting refactoring verification. ConfiguracionPage (958→296 lines) and AlertasPage (612→138 lines) refactored into sub-components. All refactored components working correctly. Frontend: 100% pass rate. No backend changes in this iteration.

Organization form: All fields (Nombre, RFC, Rubro, Email, Telefono, Domicilio) present

Multi-Donataria section: 'Crear Nueva Organizacion' button present
MembersSection: 'Miembros y Roles' section with member list
MembersSection: 5 role dropdowns for members found
MembersSection: Invite dialog opens with email input, role select, and submit button
AlertasPage: PageHeader with 'Motor de Alertas AML' title

AlertasPage: Export CSV button with data-testid='export-alertas-btn'

AlertasTable: Severity badges (media, alta) displayed correctly
ReglaCard: Rule cards with toggle switches and action menus
AlertRuleDialog: Opens with form fields (nombre, tipo, severidad, monto)

AlertasPage refactored from 612 to 138 lines - improved maintainability
LogoUploadSection, NotificationsSection, CronSection, MembersSection properly extracted
CommonComponents (StatCard, PageHeader, etc.) created for reuse

eslint-disable-line comments added for useEffect dependencies (acceptable pattern)
Array index as keys fixed with stable IDs
